title: Generating a Recursive Tree Data Structure
scenario: Write a recursive function that generates a tree data structure representing a directory hierarchy. The function should take a list of directories and their subdirectories as input and return a tree data structure containing the directory hierarchy. The tree should be represented as a nested dictionary with directory names as keys and their corresponding subdirectories as values.
constraints: Must handle directory names as keys and their subdirectories as values
Must be able to handle nested subdirectories

evaluationCriteria.description: The code is syntactically correct and uses proper Python syntax.
The code adheres to the specified constraints, including the use of a recursive approach and handling of nested subdirectories.
The tree data structure correctly represents the directory hierarchy with directory names as keys and their subdirectories as values.
